summary: Add interactive confirmation in grants_messages_send.go before the outbound POST; --yes / --agent / --no-input / --dry-run all bypass.
reason: Greptile P1 review finding on PR #676: the PR description promises an interactive confirmation that --yes (or --agent) bypasses, but the generated send command dispatched the API call immediately with no guard. Non-interactive shells without --yes now fail explicitly instead of either prompting blindly or sending silently.
